strings.value: A strange illness spreads through the capital. The High Priest urges public prayer; your advisors demand quarantine and coin for physicians.
Raiders burn villages along the eastern border. Generals demand a full campaign; merchants beg you to buy the raiders off instead.
A neighboring kingdom offers a marriage alliance. The Church calls it a blessing; the treasury warns the feast will empty the coffers.
A scarred hunter kneels before the throne. He swears a winged shadow nests in the northern peaks — and offers to lead an expedition.
The hunter returns at dusk, ash on his cloak. He drops a black scale at your feet — proof the northern peaks are not empty.
Seal the news in the vault
The dragon of the northern peaks circles the capital. Priests demand offerings; generals urge a siege of its lair.
Survivors of the dragon war drag chests of scorched gold into the courtyard. The people cheer — the Church calls it cursed.
Claim the hoard for the crown
